class BetaManagedAgentsBillingError:Óāö

The caller's organization or workspace cannot make model requests ‚ÄĒ out of credits or spend limit reached. Retrying with the same credentials will not succeed; the caller must resolve the billing state.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsCredentialHostUnreachableError:Óāö

An `environment_variable` credential's `auth.networking.allowed_hosts` includes a host the environment's network policy does not permit.

String credentialIdÓāö

ID of the affected credential.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

String vaultIdÓāö

ID of the vault containing the affected credential.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams:Óāö

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

ÓÄ™

List<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)> contentÓāö

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

String textÓāö

The text content.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

class BetaManagedAgentsMcpAuthenticationFailedError:Óāö

Authentication to an MCP server failed.

String mcpServerNameÓāö

Name of the MCP server that failed authentication.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent:Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent:Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Result resultÓāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

String toolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> denyMessageÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent:Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String customToolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<List<Content>> contentÓāö

The result content returned by the tool.

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent:Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String descriptionÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Optional<Long> maxIterationsÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

String outcomeIdÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Rubric rubricÓāö

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

Rubric referenced by a file uploaded via the Files API.

String fileIdÓāö

ID of the rubric file.

Type typeÓāö

class BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric:Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

String contentÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent:Óāö

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Error errorÓāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError:Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent:Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent:Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Result resultÓāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

String toolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> denyMessageÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

The result content returned by the tool.

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent:Óāö

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Input inputÓāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

String nameÓāö

Name of the custom tool being called.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

ÓÄ™

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentMcpToolUseEvent:Óāö

Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Input inputÓāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

String mcpServerNameÓāö

Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

String nameÓāö

Name of the MCP tool being used.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<EvaluatedPermission> evaluatedPermissionÓāö

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

ASK("ask")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

ÓÄ™

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

ASK("ask")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent:Óāö

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Error errorÓāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError:Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusIdleEvent:Óāö

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

StopReason stopReasonÓāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn:Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction:Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

List<String> eventIdsÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted:Óāö

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent:Óāö

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String explanationÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeEvaluationStartIdÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String resultÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) usageÓāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

ÓÄ™

Emitted when a model request is initiated by the agent.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Optional<Boolean> isErrorÓāö

String modelRequestStartIdÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.model_request_start` event.

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) modelUsageÓāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent:Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent:Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String descriptionÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Optional<Long> maxIterationsÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

String outcomeIdÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Rubric rubricÓāö

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsFileRubric:Óāö

Rubric referenced by a file uploaded via the Files API.

String fileIdÓāö

ID of the rubric file.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric:Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

String contentÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionDeletedEvent:Óāö

Emitted when a session has been deleted. Terminates any active event stream ‚ÄĒ no further events will be emitted for this session.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRunningEvent:Óāö

A session thread has begun executing. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that started running.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent:Óāö

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

ÓÄ™

StopReason stopReasonÓāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn:Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction:Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

List<String> eventIdsÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted:Óāö

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusTerminatedEvent:Óāö

A session thread has terminated and will accept no further input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that terminated.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolResultEvent:Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of an agent-toolset tool execution. Only valid on `self_hosted` environments, where sandbox-routed tools are executed by the client rather than the server.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String toolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<List<Content>> contentÓāö

The result content returned by the tool.

CLAUDE\_FABLE\_5("claude-fable-5")Óāö

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_8("claude-opus-4-8")Óāö

Best combination of speed and intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5("claude-haiku-4-5")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5\_20251001("claude-haiku-4-5-20251001")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5("claude-opus-4-5")Óāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent:Óāö

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

ÓÄ™

StopReason stopReasonÓāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn:Óāö

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction:Óāö

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

List<String> eventIdsÓāö

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted:Óāö

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRescheduledEvent:Óāö

A session thread hit a transient error and is retrying automatically. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that is retrying.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRunningEvent:Óāö

A session thread has begun executing. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that started running.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusTerminatedEvent:Óāö

A session thread has terminated and will accept no further input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that terminated.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestEndEvent:Óāö

Emitted when a model request completes.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Optional<Boolean> isErrorÓāö

Whether the model request resulted in an error.

String modelRequestStartIdÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.model_request_start` event.

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) modelUsageÓāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestStartEvent:Óāö

Emitted when a model request is initiated by the agent.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage:Óāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String explanationÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeEvaluationStartIdÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String resultÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) usageÓāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent:Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent:Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent:Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Result resultÓāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

String toolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> denyMessageÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent:Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String customToolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<List<Content>> contentÓāö

The result content returned by the tool.

One of the following:

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent:Óāö

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Input inputÓāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

String nameÓāö

Name of the custom tool being called.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent:Óāö

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Error errorÓāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError:Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent:Óāö

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String explanationÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeEvaluationStartIdÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String resultÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) usageÓāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

ÓÄ™

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent:Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent:Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String descriptionÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Optional<Long> maxIterationsÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

String outcomeIdÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Rubric rubricÓāö

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

String fileIdÓāö

ID of the rubric file.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric:Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

String contentÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRescheduledEvent:Óāö

A session thread hit a transient error and is retrying automatically. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that is retrying.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionUpdatedEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

Model identifier and configuration.

BetaManagedAgentsModel idÓāö

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

CLAUDE\_FABLE\_5("claude-fable-5")Óāö

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_8("claude-opus-4-8")Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_7("claude-opus-4-7")Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_6("claude-opus-4-6")Óāö

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_6("claude-sonnet-4-6")Óāö

Best combination of speed and intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5("claude-haiku-4-5")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5\_20251001("claude-haiku-4-5-20251001")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5("claude-opus-4-5")Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5\_20251101("claude-opus-4-5-20251101")Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_5("claude-sonnet-4-5")Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_5\_20250929("claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929")Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent:Óāö

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

List<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)> contentÓāö

System content blocks. Text-only.

String textÓāö

The text content.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams:Óāö

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

ÓÄ™

List<[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)> contentÓāö

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

String textÓāö

The text content.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsTextBlock:Óāö

Regular text content.

String textÓāö

The text content.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric:Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

String contentÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsTextRubricParams:Óāö

Rubric content provided inline as text.

String contentÓāö

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown ‚ÄĒ the grader treats it as freeform text. Maximum 262144 characters.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError:Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

ÓÄ™

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

Type typeÓāö

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent:Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String descriptionÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Optional<Long> maxIterationsÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

String outcomeIdÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Rubric rubricÓāö

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent:Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent:Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Result resultÓāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

String toolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> denyMessageÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams:Óāö

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> denyMessageÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResource:Óāö

A memory store attached to an agent session.

String memoryStoreIdÓāö

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<Access> accessÓāö

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

READ\_WRITE("read\_write")Óāö

READ\_ONLY("read\_only")Óāö

Optional<String> descriptionÓāö

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

Optional<String> instructionsÓāö

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

Optional<String> mountPathÓāö

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

Optional<String> nameÓāö

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThread:Óāö

An execution thread within a `session`. Each session has one primary thread plus zero or more child threads spawned by the coordinator.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this thread.

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadAgent](api/beta.md) agentÓāö

Resolved `agent` definition for a single `session_thread`. Snapshot of the agent at thread creation time. The multiagent roster is not repeated here; read it from `Session.agent`.

String idÓāö

Optional<String> descriptionÓāö

Model identifier and configuration.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsModel idÓāö

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

CLAUDE\_FABLE\_5("claude-fable-5")Óāö

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_8("claude-opus-4-8")Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_7("claude-opus-4-7")Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_6("claude-opus-4-6")Óāö

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_6("claude-sonnet-4-6")Óāö

Best combination of speed and intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5("claude-haiku-4-5")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5\_20251001("claude-haiku-4-5-20251001")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5("claude-opus-4-5")Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5\_20251101("claude-opus-4-5-20251101")Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_5("claude-sonnet-4-5")Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_5\_20250929("claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929")Óāö

High-performance model for agents and coding

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

The session this thread belongs to.

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStats](api/beta.md)> statsÓāö

Timing statistics for a session thread.

Optional<Double> activeSecondsÓāö

Cumulative time in seconds the thread spent actively running. Excludes idle time.

Optional<Double> durationSecondsÓāö

Elapsed time since thread creation in seconds. For archived threads, frozen at the final update.

Optional<Double> startupSecondsÓāö

Time in seconds for the thread to begin running. Zero for child threads, which start immediately.

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatus](api/beta.md) statusÓāö

SessionThreadStatus enum

One of the following:

RUNNING("running")Óāö

IDLE("idle")Óāö

RESCHEDULING("rescheduling")Óāö

TERMINATED("terminated")Óāö

Type typeÓāö

LocalDateTime updatedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadUsage](api/beta.md)> usageÓāö

Cumulative token usage for a session thread across all turns.

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsCacheCreationUsage](api/beta.md)> cacheCreationÓāö

Prompt-cache creation token usage broken down by cache lifetime.

Optional<Long> ephemeral1hInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create 1-hour ephemeral cache entries.

Optional<Long> ephemeral5mInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create 5-minute ephemeral cache entries.

Optional<Long> cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Total tokens read from prompt cache.

Optional<Long> inputTokensÓāö

Total input tokens consumed across all turns.

Optional<Long> outputTokensÓāö

Total output tokens generated across all turns.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStats:Óāö

Timing statistics for a session thread.

Optional<Double> activeSecondsÓāö

Cumulative time in seconds the thread spent actively running. Excludes idle time.

Optional<Double> durationSecondsÓāö

Elapsed time since thread creation in seconds. For archived threads, frozen at the final update.

Optional<Double> startupSecondsÓāö

Time in seconds for the thread to begin running. Zero for child threads, which start immediately.

ÓÄ™

RUNNING("running")Óāö

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent:Óāö

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent:Óāö

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Result resultÓāö

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

ALLOW("allow")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

String toolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> denyMessageÓāö

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserCustomToolResultEvent:Óāö

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String customToolUseIdÓāö

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<List<Content>> contentÓāö

The result content returned by the tool.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultCitations](api/beta.md) citationsÓāö

Citation settings for a search result.

boolean enabledÓāö

List<[BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultContent](api/beta.md)> contentÓāö

Array of text content blocks from the search result.

String textÓāö

The text content.

Type typeÓāö

String sourceÓāö

The URL source of the search result.

String titleÓāö

The title of the search result.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<Boolean> isErrorÓāö

Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

Optional<LocalDateTime> processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent:Óāö

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

Input inputÓāö

Input parameters for the tool call.

String nameÓāö

Name of the custom tool being called.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

Optional<String> sessionThreadIdÓāö

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

ÓÄ™

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

ASK("ask")Óāö

DENY("deny")Óāö

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent:Óāö

Unique identifier for this event.

ÓÄ™

Error errorÓāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError:Óāö

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

String messageÓāö

Human-readable error description.

RetryStatus retryStatusÓāö

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying:Óāö

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted:Óāö

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal:Óāö

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent:Óāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String agentNameÓāö

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String sessionThreadIdÓāö

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent:Óāö

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal ‚ÄĒ no further evaluation cycles follow.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String explanationÓāö

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeEvaluationStartIdÓāö

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String resultÓāö

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet ‚ÄĒ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md) usageÓāö

Token usage for a single model request.

long cacheCreationInputTokensÓāö

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

long cacheReadInputTokensÓāö

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

long inputTokensÓāö

Input tokens consumed by this request.

long outputTokensÓāö

Output tokens generated by this request.

ÓÄ™

Optional<Speed> speedÓāö

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

STANDARD("standard")Óāö

FAST("fast")Óāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent:Óāö

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

long iterationÓāö

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

String outcomeIdÓāö

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent:Óāö

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

String idÓāö

Unique identifier for this event.

String descriptionÓāö

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Optional<Long> maxIterationsÓāö

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

String outcomeIdÓāö

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

LocalDateTime processedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Rubric rubricÓāö

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

[BetaManagedAgentsModelConfig](api/beta.md) modelÓāö

Model identifier and configuration.

ÓÄ™

BetaManagedAgentsModel idÓāö

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

One of the following:

CLAUDE\_FABLE\_5("claude-fable-5")Óāö

Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_8("claude-opus-4-8")Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_7("claude-opus-4-7")Óāö

Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_6("claude-opus-4-6")Óāö

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding

CLAUDE\_SONNET\_4\_6("claude-sonnet-4-6")Óāö

Best combination of speed and intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5("claude-haiku-4-5")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_HAIKU\_4\_5\_20251001("claude-haiku-4-5-20251001")Óāö

Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5("claude-opus-4-5")Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

CLAUDE\_OPUS\_4\_5\_20251101("claude-opus-4-5-20251101")Óāö

Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

#### BetaSessionsThreadsEvents

##### [List Session Thread Events](api/beta/sessions/threads/events/list.md)

EventListPage beta().sessions().threads().events().list(EventListParamsparams, RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}/events

##### [Stream Session Thread Events](api/beta/sessions/threads/events/stream.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsStreamSessionThreadEvents](api/beta.md) beta().sessions().threads().events().streamStreaming(EventStreamParamsparams, RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

GET/v1/sessions/{session\_id}/threads/{thread\_id}/stream

#### BetaDeployments

##### [Create Deployment](api/beta/deployments/create.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeployment](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().create(DeploymentCreateParamsparams, RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/deployments

##### [List Deployments](api/beta/deployments/list.md)

DeploymentListPage beta().deployments().list(DeploymentListParamsparams = DeploymentListParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

GET/v1/deployments

##### [Get Deployment](api/beta/deployments/retrieve.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeployment](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().retrieve(DeploymentRetrieveParamsparams = DeploymentRetrieveParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

GET/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}

##### [Update Deployment](api/beta/deployments/update.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeployment](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().update(DeploymentUpdateParamsparams = DeploymentUpdateParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}

##### [Archive Deployment](api/beta/deployments/archive.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeployment](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().archive(DeploymentArchiveParamsparams = DeploymentArchiveParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/archive

##### [Run Deployment Now](api/beta/deployments/run.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentRun](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().run(DeploymentRunParamsparams = DeploymentRunParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/run

##### [Pause Deployment](api/beta/deployments/pause.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeployment](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().pause(DeploymentPauseParamsparams = DeploymentPauseParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/pause

##### [Unpause Deployment](api/beta/deployments/unpause.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsDeployment](api/beta.md) beta().deployments().unpause(DeploymentUnpauseParamsparams = DeploymentUnpauseParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/deployments/{deployment\_id}/unpause

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError:Óāö

The deployment's agent was archived.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsCronSchedule:Óāö

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

String expressionÓāö

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

String timezoneÓāö

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> lastRunAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<List<LocalDateTime>> upcomingRunsAtÓāö

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleParams:Óāö

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

String expressionÓāö

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

String timezoneÓāö

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<LocalDateTime> lastRunAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<List<LocalDateTime>> upcomingRunsAtÓāö

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

ÓÄ™

[BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatus](api/beta.md) statusÓāö

Lifecycle status of a deployment.

One of the following:

ACTIVE("active")Óāö

PAUSED("paused")Óāö

Type typeÓāö

LocalDateTime updatedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

List<String> vaultIdsÓāö

Vault IDs supplying stored credentials for sessions created from this deployment.

ÓÄ™

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

class BetaManagedAgentsEnvironmentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError:Óāö

ÓÄ™

A referenced resource no longer exists and its kind was not reported.

The deployment's workspace was archived.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

The deployment's organization is disabled.

A vault referenced by the deployment is archived.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownDeploymentPausedReasonError:Óāö

An unrecognized error auto-paused the deployment. A fallback variant; matches a run whose `error.type` is `unknown_error`.

class BetaManagedAgentsSelfHostedResourcesUnsupportedDeploymentPausedReasonError:Óāö

String nameÓāö

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfig:Óāö

A memory store attached to each session created from this deployment.

String memoryStoreIdÓāö

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

Optional<Access> accessÓāö

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

READ\_WRITE("read\_write")Óāö

READ\_ONLY("read\_only")Óāö

Optional<String> instructionsÓāö

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsOrganizationDisabledDeploymentPausedReasonError:Óāö

The deployment's organization is disabled.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSchedule:Óāö

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

String expressionÓāö

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

String timezoneÓāö

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> lastRunAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<List<LocalDateTime>> upcomingRunsAtÓāö

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsScheduleParams:Óāö

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

String expressionÓāö

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

String timezoneÓāö

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSelfHostedResourcesUnsupportedDeploymentPausedReasonError:Óāö

The deployment configures resources, but its environment is self-hosted and cannot mount them.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceConfig: A class that can be one of several variants.union Óāö

A configured session resource. Echoes the input minus write-only credentials.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsGitHubRepositoryResourceConfig:Óāö

A GitHub repository mounted into each session's container. The authorization token is write-only and never returned.

Type typeÓāö

String urlÓāö

Github URL of the repository

ÓÄ™

Optional<Checkout> checkoutÓāö

Branch or commit to check out. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

class BetaManagedAgentsCredential:Óāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

ÓÄ™

Auth authÓāö

Authentication details for a credential.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsMcpOAuthAuthResponse:Óāö

OAuth credential details for an MCP server.

URL of the MCP server this credential authenticates against.

Type typeÓāö

Optional<LocalDateTime> expiresAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsMcpOAuthRefreshResponse](api/beta.md)> refreshÓāö

OAuth client ID.

Token endpoint URL used to refresh the access token.

TokenEndpointAuth tokenEndpointAuthÓāö

Token endpoint requires no client authentication.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsTokenEndpointAuthBasicResponse:Óāö

class BetaManagedAgentsStaticBearerAuthResponse:Óāö

Static bearer token credential details for an MCP server.

URL of the MCP server this credential authenticates against.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsEnvironmentVariableAuthResponse:Óāö

Environment variable credential details. The secret value is never returned.

ÓÄ™

Networking networkingÓāö

Outbound hosts the secret value is substituted on.

One of the following:

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingResponse:Óāö

The secret is substituted on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingResponse:Óāö

The secret is substituted only on requests to the listed hosts.

List<String> allowedHostsÓāö

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. An entry matches the request host exactly; a `*.`-prefixed entry matches any subdomain of the named domain but not the domain itself.

Type typeÓāö

String secretNameÓāö

Name of the environment variable.

Type typeÓāö

LocalDateTime createdAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Metadata metadataÓāö

Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the credential.

Type typeÓāö

LocalDateTime updatedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

String vaultIdÓāö

Identifier of the vault this credential belongs to.

Optional<String> displayNameÓāö

Human-readable name for the credential.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsCredentialNetworkingParams: A class that can be one of several variants.union Óāö

Substitute the secret on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to. The Environment's network policy is the only boundary on where the secret can reach.

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingParams:Óāö

Substitute the secret on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to. The Environment's network policy is the only boundary on where the secret can reach.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingParams:Óāö

Substitute the secret only on requests to the listed hosts.

List<String> allowedHostsÓāö

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. Each entry is a bare hostname (`api.example.com`), an IPv4 address (`192.0.2.1`), or a `*.`-prefixed wildcard (`*.example.com`). URLs, ports, paths, and IPv6 addresses are not accepted. At most 16 entries.

Type typeÓāö

ÓÄ™

class BetaManagedAgentsCredentialValidation:Óāö

Result of live-probing a credential against its configured MCP server.

String credentialIdÓāö

Unique identifier of the credential that was validated.

boolean hasRefreshTokenÓāö

Whether the credential has a refresh token configured.

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsMcpProbe](api/beta.md)> mcpProbeÓāö

The failing step of an MCP validation probe.

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsRefreshHttpResponse](api/beta.md)> httpResponseÓāö

An HTTP response captured during a credential validation probe.

String bodyÓāö

Response body. May be truncated and has sensitive values scrubbed.

boolean bodyTruncatedÓāö

Whether `body` was truncated.

String contentTypeÓāö

Value of the `Content-Type` response header.

long statusCodeÓāö

HTTP status code.

String methodÓāö

The MCP method that failed (for example `initialize` or `tools/list`).

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsRefreshObject](api/beta.md)> refreshÓāö

Outcome of a refresh-token exchange attempted during credential validation.

ÓÄ™

Optional<[BetaManagedAgentsRefreshHttpResponse](api/beta.md)> httpResponseÓāö

An HTTP response captured during a credential validation probe.

String bodyÓāö

Response body. May be truncated and has sensitive values scrubbed.

boolean bodyTruncatedÓāö

Whether `body` was truncated.

String contentTypeÓāö

Value of the `Content-Type` response header.

long statusCodeÓāö

HTTP status code.

ÓÄ™

Status statusÓāö

Outcome of a refresh-token exchange attempted during credential validation.

One of the following:

SUCCEEDED("succeeded")Óāö

FAILED("failed")Óāö

CONNECT\_ERROR("connect\_error")Óāö

NO\_REFRESH\_TOKEN("no\_refresh\_token")Óāö

ÓÄ™

One of the following:

INVALID("invalid")Óāö

UNKNOWN("unknown")Óāö

Type typeÓāö

LocalDateTime validatedAtÓāö

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Identifier of the vault containing the credential.

INVALID("invalid")Óāö

UNKNOWN("unknown")Óāö

#### BetaMemory Stores

##### [Create a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/create.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore](api/beta.md) beta().memoryStores().create(MemoryStoreCreateParamsparams, RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

POST/v1/memory\_stores

##### [List memory stores](api/beta/memory_stores/list.md)

MemoryStoreListPage beta().memoryStores().list(MemoryStoreListParamsparams = MemoryStoreListParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

GET/v1/memory\_stores

##### [Retrieve a memory store](api/beta/memory_stores/retrieve.md)

[BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore](api/beta.md) beta().memoryStores().retrieve(MemoryStoreRetrieveParamsparams = MemoryStoreRetrieveParams.none(), RequestOptionsrequestOptions = RequestOptions.none())

GET/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}

POST/v1/memory\_stores/{memory\_store\_id}
